ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company (can be a list of emails) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "company_profile" TEXT /* Detailed profile of the company, including services offered and company history */,
  "web_type" TEXT /* Type of the company's web presence (e.g., Services, Products) */,
  "web_category" TEXT /* Category of the company's web presence (e.g., Real Estate Consultants) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the company registered on the platform */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the company */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating given by clients (scale of 1-5) */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews received by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_categories" (
  "company_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-category relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "primary_category" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if this is the primary category for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_categories_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, client, service provider) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., inquiry, visit, call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or details about the interaction */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the company's response to the interaction (e.g., pending, responded, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., license, certification, insurance) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File containing the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_documents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_services_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the inquiry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being inquired about */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_text" TEXT /* Text of the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_inquiries_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES company_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_inquiries_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
